name: quri
description: AI 학습 퀴즈 웹앱 — 주제 기반 문제 생성/풀이/해설 (NestJS + React + Copilot)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/agent && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/agent && npm run test --workspace=apps/api
